user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Tailspin Toys.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-02 15:23 EST
Subject: URGENT: renewal risk Issue at Tailspin Toys

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about renewal risk. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 14:38 EST
Subject: Re: Re: renewal risk Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with renewal risk. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 11:45 EST
Subject: Re: renewal risk Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the renewal risk proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: renewal risk Discussion - Tailspin Toys
Date: 2024-02-24
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), Kevin (Tailspin Toys)

[00:02:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on renewal risk from our last session.

[00:05:00] Kevin (Tailspin Toys): Let me add some context -- we've been working on timeline constraints and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:07:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:09:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:12:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:16:00] Kevin (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:18:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Tailspin Toys: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy
